description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-switch` (T1-12). 6/6 libraries ship this — distinct from checkbox.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-switch/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, `role="switch"` distinct from checkbox, on/off values typed, ElementInternals
2. Accessibility — `role="switch"` (NOT checkbox), `aria-checked` (true/false only, no mixed), keyboard (Space to toggle, Enter if in form context), label required, axe-core pass
3. Tests — on/off toggle, form association, disabled state, label click toggles
4. Storybook — on/off states, with/without labels, disabled
5. CSS — slider track animation, `--hx-*` tokens, no hardcoded transition timing, CSS parts (track, thumb, label)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — form-associated, Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-switch/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-switch — T1-12 antagonistic quality review
